title: A hellish apocalypse
description: Explore a giant apocalyptic world where zombies will chase you down and kill you. Find cities, villages, and more to gather resources and survive as long as possible.
body:
An incredible modpack that brings many things to Minecraft, such as: Ruined cities after the great apocalypse caused by a virus that wiped out everything in the vast world of Minecraft. Luckily, you can defend yourself with new weapons like axes, katanas, pistols, and more. Be very careful with the bosses, as they are very difficult to defeat. Enjoy a vast apocalyptic world with ruined cities, zombies everywhere chasing you, new and improved villages, and incredible new weapons that will help protect you if you are pursued by zombies. Search for resources in all kinds of structures to survive.

IMPORTANT: Activate all texture packs for a better experience.

I recommend downloading this modpack to experience a great sense of tension and fear where any mistake can be your end.

This modpack is one of my first, so please don't criticize things like lag or other issues because I'm still learning how to make modpacks. Thanks for reading.
